steps.data:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Fox News Travel Packing List
 * Description: Registers a Remote Data Block for the Fox News Travel Packing List product feed.
 * Version:     1.0.0
 */

if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) {
	exit;
}

function register_fox_news_travel_packing_list_block() {
	if ( ! function_exists( 'register_remote_data_block' ) ) {
		return;
	}

	$data_source = [
		'display_name' => 'Fox News Travel Packing List API',
		'endpoint'     => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/commerce-travel-fox/data.json',
	];

	$render_query = [
		'display_name'  => 'Get Travel Packing List Items',
		'data_source'   => $data_source,
		'output_schema' => [
			'is_collection' => true,
			'type'          => [
				'id'             => [ 'name' => 'ID',             'path' => '$.id',             'type' => 'id'     ],
				'name'           => [ 'name' => 'Name',           'path' => '$.name',           'type' => 'string' ],
				'description'    => [ 'name' => 'Description',    'path' => '$.description',    'type' => 'string' ],
				'price'          => [ 'name' => 'Price',          'path' => '$.price',          'type' => 'string' ],
				'original_price' => [ 'name' => 'Original Price', 'path' => '$.original_price', 'type' => 'string' ],
				'discount'       => [ 'name' => 'Discount',       'path' => '$.discount',       'type' => 'string' ],
				'brand'          => [ 'name' => 'Brand',          'path' => '$.brand',          'type' => 'string' ],
				'category'       => [ 'name' => 'Category',       'path' => '$.category',       'type' => 'string' ],
			],
		],
	];

	register_remote_data_block( [
		'title'        => 'Fox News Travel Packing List',
		'render_query' => [ 'query' => $render_query ],
	] );
}
add_action( 'init', 'register_fox_news_travel_packing_list_block', 10, 0 );

options.blogname: Demo — Fox News Travel Packing List
